original_statement: who was the next manager after george case?
mutated_statement: who was the next person after that individual?
mutation_analysis: [Role generalization + Named-entity anonymization]: "manager" → "person" | "George Case" → "that individual" (who was the next manager after George Case? → who was the next person after that individual?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought可识别出的关键信息：文中写到“If ‘that individual’ refers to Tommy Heath, the next person after him is Bill Werle.”，该句明确提到原问题指称不明确并给出假设。Agent具体表现为：并未向用户反问或请求澄清，而是在日志中承认代词指代不确定性后直接基于一个假设（that individual = Tommy Heath）去检索并给出具体答案（Bill Werle）。因此符合“意识到模糊但猜测并作答”的情形：既承认歧义，又不求证而是基于假设继续执行并返回具体结果。
